title: 日経賞の後に・ここがいい

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Demon Legs Narita Taishin does it! Narita Taishin
takes first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Taishin! Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is going wild, but I can hear her yelling
for me over the noise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I jump the fence and go straight to her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I get it. I understand now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't race because it's all I have or because I
don't have any other choice...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I do it because this is what I want. I want to race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I want to win my races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Basking in the cheers of the audience, Narita
Taishin and I are overjoyed in our newfound
resolve to keep pushing forward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, I wanna talk to you about my next goal.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I wanna run in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ticket and Hayahide said they're going for it too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I was nowhere near their level when we ran in the
Kikuka Sho. So...
choice_data_list: This is your chance to redeem yourself, then!
This is your chance to redeem yourself, then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're seriously so cringe when you get
hyper-enthused like that, but... yeah.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I want you to help me prepare for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our sights set anew, Narita Taishin and I
prepare for the spring Tenno Sho!
